bull.b: Largest-ever agreement with a state transportation department creates a multi-year revenue backlog and validates capability to win large-scale public-sector deployments.
Significant reduction in adjusted EBITDA loss combined with stronger gross margin expectations suggests improving unit economics as contracts scale.
Record quarterly revenue above consensus indicates accelerating demand for the Discover traffic analytics platform and strengthens top-line momentum.

bear.b: Dependence on the timing and billing of large public-sector contracts creates cash flow sensitivity that could worsen short-term funding pressures.
Requirement to raise external capital to shore up liquidity may result in equity issuance and dilute existing shareholders if financing terms are unfavorable.
Ongoing liquidity concerns could constrain operations and limit the company's ability to fund growth without securing additional capital.
